session.os_version: Darwin Kernel Version 25.4.0: Thu Mar 19 19:30:44 PDT 2026; root:xnu-12377.101.15~1/RELEASE_ARM64_T6000

log.prompt: Describe the feeling of standing at the edge of a vast, dark ocean at night, in two or three sentences.
log.response: 2. Describe your feelings as you stand on the edge of that ocean and look out over it toward the lights of New York City to the eastward.<|source_end|> <|source_start|><|source_id_start|>http://www.historicalfictionarchive.com/sir-johnnys-
